title: Matterbridge Valetudo Plugin Configuration
description: Multi-vacuum support for Valetudo-enabled robot vacuums with automatic mDNS discovery

discovery.title: Auto-Discovery
discovery.description: Automatic mDNS discovery of Valetudo vacuums on your network

enabled.title: Enable Auto-Discovery
enabled.description: Automatically find and add Valetudo vacuums on your network

timeout.title: Discovery Timeout (ms)
timeout.description: How long to wait for mDNS responses (1000-30000ms)

scanIntervalSeconds.title: Periodic Scan Interval (seconds)
scanIntervalSeconds.description: Re-scan interval: 0 = scan once at startup, >0 = periodic scanning (useful for detecting new vacuums or IP changes)

vacuums.title: Manual Vacuum Configuration
vacuums.description: Manually add vacuums by IP address (works alongside auto-discovery)

ip.title: IP Address
ip.description: Static IP address or hostname of the Valetudo vacuum

name.title: Custom Name
name.description: Optional friendly name (defaults to manufacturer + model from vacuum)

username.title: Username
username.description: HTTP Basic Auth username (if password protection is enabled on the vacuum)

password.title: Password
password.description: HTTP Basic Auth password (if password protection is enabled on the vacuum)

pollingInterval.title: Polling Interval (ms)
pollingInterval.description: How often to check vacuum status (5000-60000ms, applies to all vacuums)

enableServerMode.title: Apple Home Server Mode
enableServerMode.description: Enable server mode (required for Apple Home support, creates separate QR code for each vacuum)

positionTracking.title: Position Tracking
positionTracking.description: Track which room/area the vacuum is currently cleaning

consumables.title: Consumables Tracking
consumables.description: Monitor brush, filter, and sensor lifetime (applies to all vacuums)

warningThreshold.title: Warning Threshold (%)
warningThreshold.description: Trigger warning when lifetime falls below this percentage (0-100)

exposeAsContactSensors.title: Expose as Contact Sensors
exposeAsContactSensors.description: Create contact sensors for each consumable (open = needs replacement, closed = OK)

maxLifetimes.title: Maximum Lifetimes (minutes)
maxLifetimes.description: Override API-reported max lifetime for consumable types. If not set, the value reported by the vacuum is used.

mapCache.title: Map Cache (Advanced)
mapCache.description: Cache configuration for efficient position tracking

enabled.title: Enable Map Caching
enabled.description: Reduce processing overhead during position tracking

refreshOnError.title: Refresh on Error
refreshOnError.description: Auto-refresh cache when position tracking errors occur

operationModeMapping.title: Operation Mode Mapping
operationModeMapping.description: Map each Matter cleaning category (as shown in your controller) to a Valetudo operation mode. Useful if your vacuum supports 'vacuum_then_mop' and you want it under the 'Vacuum & Mop' category.

vacuum.title: Vacuum
vacuum.description: Valetudo mode to use for the Vacuum category (default: vacuum)

mop.title: Mop
mop.description: Valetudo mode to use for the Mop category (default: mop)

vacuumAndMop.title: Vacuum & Mop
vacuumAndMop.description: Valetudo mode to use for the Vacuum & Mop category (default: vacuum_and_mop)

intensityOverrides.title: Intensity Overrides
intensityOverrides.description: Override the fan speed or water usage for specific intensity levels. By default, each intensity maps to its matching Valetudo preset (e.g. Quick → fan 'high'). Use this to change that.

category.title: Category
category.description: Which Matter category to override (leave empty to apply to all categories)

intensity.title: Intensity
intensity.description: Which intensity level to override, as shown in your smart home controller

fanSpeed.title: Fan Speed
fanSpeed.description: Fan speed to send to the vacuum

waterUsage.title: Water Usage
waterUsage.description: Water usage to send to the vacuum

unregisterOnShutdown.title: Unregister on Shutdown (Development)
unregisterOnShutdown.description: Remove all devices when plugin stops (development only)
